overview: A high-end, conversion-focused, mobile-first website for Roofing Atlanta — a trusted roofing contractor serving Metro Atlanta from 3565 Piedmont Rd NE, Buckhead. Designed to generate leads and bookings from homeowners and commercial property managers, especially during post-storm scenarios.
features: Bold hero with click-to-call and fast quote form
Services showcase: Roof Repair, Replacement, Gutter Installation, Emergency Tarping
Before & After gallery with lightbox viewer and service type filters
Online booking calendar for on-site inspection scheduling
Service area map centered on Piedmont Rd NE, Buckhead
Trust signals: 5-star Google Reviews, licensing badges, Storm Specialist callout, Lifetime Labor Warranties
